---
title: "Analysis Template"
format:
  html:
    code-tools:
      source: "../code/analysis.qmd"
      caption: "Download"
---

{{< include ../_hardcoded_values.qmd >}}

# General information

We provide a template `.qmd`-file with this guide. You can download it via the `Download`-button in the top right corner. This template in particular is designed to be a starting point for your analyses, following many of the best practices for reproducibility and clarity. Note that you may need to download and place additional content in the respective folder for this script to run (e.g. `references.bib`). You can download this `.bib`-file and all other parts of the project behind this guide from the [GitHub repository][repo-url].

# Preview

{{< include ../code/analysis.qmd >}}
